testcase.name: Saved Posts Functionality - Real E2E Validation › Complete save/unsave/filter workflow
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › e2e/saved-posts-validation.spec.ts:9:3 › Saved Posts Functionality - Real E2E Validation › Complete save/unsave/filter workflow
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('[data-testid="post-card"]').first() Expected: visible Received: <element(s) not found> Timeout: 10000ms
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator('[data-testid="post-card"]').first()
12 | // Step 1: Find a post to save 13 | const firstPost = page.locator('[data-testid="post-card"]').first(); > 14 | await expect(firstPost).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 15 | 16 | const postId = await firstPost.getAttribute('data-post-id'); 17 | console.log(`📌 Testing with post ID: ${postId}`); at /workspaces/agent-feed/frontend/tests/e2e/saved-posts-validation.spec.ts:14:29

testcase.name: Saved Posts Functionality - Real E2E Validation › API endpoints validation
testcase.system-out: 🌐 Testing API endpoints directly ✅ Save API endpoint working ✅ Filter API endpoint working - found 2 saved posts ✅ Unsave API endpoint working 🎉 All API endpoints validated successfully!

testcase.name: Saved Posts Functionality - Real E2E Validation › Engagement data validation
testcase.system-out: 📊 Testing engagement data inclusion ✅ Engagement data present - isSaved: false 🎉 Engagement data validation successful!
